name: Sadie Maldwort
description: Daughter of Sidewich Maldwort, the apothecary. A child who frequents the Nuncle Stones at the edge of the woods with other local children.
notes: The handmade vial-shaped pin found near the Nuncle Stones was hers.

Witnessed an elf (Lucien) playing music at the Nuncle Stones. Small creatures appeared from thin air, spoke to him, and vanished with him — explaining what became of Lucien during his five-day absence.
Her father briefly scolded her for playing by the Stones.
